description_long: This is an adult human figure depicted in mid-air, with arms and legs extended outward in a dynamic pose. The individual is wearing a short-sleeved shirt and knee-length shorts, both of which fit loosely. Athletic shoes are visible on the feet, and the figure's hair is tied back in a ponytail. The musculature and body proportions suggest a physically active adult, possibly engaged in a sporting or acrobatic activity. The surface texture is matte, with visible folds and contours in the clothing and limbs, and the overall form is anatomically realistic.
description: An athletic adult in mid-air with outstretched limbs, wearing a t-shirt, shorts, and sneakers, hair tied back in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Viewed from above, the figure's back, outstretched arms, and legs are clearly visible, with the head facing downward and the ponytail discernible.
description_view_1: From this side angle, the profile of the body is visible, showing the curvature of the back, the side of the face, and the extended legs and arms.
description_view_2: This view shows the front of the figure, with the face, chest, and front of the limbs visible, as well as the details of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_3: From this rotated side view, the figure's head is turned, and the ponytail, side of the torso, and one leg are prominent.
attribute_posture: mid-air with arms and legs outstretched
